titleStmt.title: SII 16.163: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 163. (A.R. No. 318 of 1905.) CHINTALAPUTTŪRU NEAR PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPAH TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the outer wall in the Indranāthasvāmin temple.
This is dated, Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Mārgaśira ba. 5, corresponding to 1547 A.D., December 1, (Thursday).

It records that on royal orders Aḷiya Rāmayyadēva-mahārāju having exempted the tax on barbers in the Karṇāṭaka country, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmayyadēvamahārāju of Nandyāla did the same for the whole of Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma; also remitted the barber tax payable by Timmōju on the villages Puttūru, Rāvulapalle and Duṁpalagaṭu belonging to the Indranātha temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣṣaṁbulu 1469 Agunēṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsara
mā¨rgaśira ba 5 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadā
sivadēva mahārāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pritivi
sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla timmayyadēva
mahārājuluvāru vrāyiṁccina śilāśāsanaṁ sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu
gāri Ānatini Aḷiyarāmayyadēvamahārājulavāri mudula ka¨rnāṭakānaku maṁgala
vāru Accē paṁnnu sarvamāṁnyaṁgānu koṁḍōjuku manniṁccina nimityāṁ nēmunu ghaṁṭikō
ṭa śīmakallānu maṁgaḷapannu sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu sēstimi yiṁdrunāthadēvuni stānaṁ grāmā
lu puttūru rāvulapalya duṁpalagaṭu yī grāmālaku maṁgaḷa timōju Accē maṁ

gaḷapannu sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu sēstimi(ṁ) yī dharmānaku yavvaruganka tappinānu śrī nara siṁhyanki tappuka gaṁgaka¨rtanu gōvu
brāṁhma caṁppina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru(ṁ) .
Digital edition of SII 16.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
